<!-- News list (newest first). Title/description come from news/_metadata.yml so
     this file has no frontmatter and can be {{< include >}}-ed into the Home
     page without leaking a "News" heading. -->

- Jun'26 — Snehashish Ghosh graduates (MS, IISc)! Congratulations.
- Mar'26 — Joined as Professor in EE (and CSE) at IIT Jammu.
